reviews.text: Amazing phone, camera quality is superb. Very happy with the purchase price on Flipkart.
Good phone but battery drains a bit fast. Overall satisfied with the deal.
Best smartphone under 70k, the dynamic island feature is really useful daily.
Heating issues noticed when playing games continuously for long hours.
Excellent product, delivery was super fast. Packaging was very secure.
Great build quality, the USB-C port is finally here. Worth upgrading.
For this price no charger in box is really disappointing. Should include.
Camera produces stunning photos in all lighting conditions. Very impressed.
Smooth performance, no lag at all. iOS experience is very polished.
Good phone but overpriced even at discount. Battery could be much better.
Super fast Prime delivery, phone was perfectly sealed and genuine Apple product.
Dynamic Island is a game changer. Battery could be better but camera is great.
Switched from Android and never looking back. iOS ecosystem is seamless.
No charger and no earphones in the box at this price is absolutely unacceptable.
USB-C upgrade is long overdue but very welcome. Build quality is premium.
Portrait mode and photogenic mode produce professional level shots easily.
Gets warm during gaming and video calls but cools down fairly quickly.
Amazon easy returns policy gave confidence to buy. Great shopping experience.
Two months in and still feels snappy. iOS updates arrive promptly always.
Decent phone but competitors offer more features at similar price points.
Bought from Croma for after-sales trust. Staff helped set up device properly.
First Apple device and totally impressed by the quality and smoothness overall.
Ordered online and picked up same day from store. Very convenient service.
No-cost EMI option made this affordable. Croma has good financing schemes.
Battery backup is around 18 hours on moderate use. Expected slightly more.
Super Retina XDR display is gorgeous. Colours are very accurate and vivid.
Box had minor dent on delivery but phone inside was perfectly fine thankfully.
Croma always delivers genuine products with proper warranty. Very trustworthy.
A16 Bionic chip keeps everything blazing fast. No slowdowns after two months.
Good for basic use but Dynamic Island gimmick gets boring after initial days.
Reliance Digital gave free screen guard installation at store. Great service.
Got good exchange value for old phone. Overall deal was quite satisfying.
Excellent build quality and camera. Photos in low light are simply outstanding.
Delivery took 4 days instead of promised 3. Product is good though.
Bought as gift, packaging was elegant and recipient was absolutely delighted.
Coming from Android it took time adjusting. iOS restrictions feel limiting sometimes.
No throttling even after months of heavy use. Apple optimizes hardware brilliantly.
Reliance Digital has excellent post-purchase support. Staff are very knowledgeable.
Price is same as MRP discount. Flipkart and Amazon offer better deals often.
Cinematic mode and Action mode videos are incredibly stabilised and smooth.
Vijay Sales always provides genuine Apple products with full box and warranty.
Delivered in just 2 days as promised. Phone was sealed properly and authentic.
Got additional bank discount on top. Final price was much lower than elsewhere.
Black colour looks very sleek and premium. Gets fingerprints but looks amazing.
Gaming performance is great but phone gets warm after 30 minutes of play.
Front camera is exceptional. Portrait selfies look absolutely professional quality.
Still no charger in 2025 is very annoying. Had to buy separately which cost extra.
Vijay Sales staff explained all features patiently. Superb customer service.
Smooth daily driver with great software updates. iOS 17 features are very useful.
Good phone overall, slight premium over online but worth it for in-store experience.
AI Circle to Search feature works brilliantly. Galaxy AI is very helpful daily.
Bright display and great performance. Slightly warm during gaming but manageable.
7 years of OS updates is the biggest selling point. Future proof smartphone.
Good phone but Samsung keeps showing ads in One UI. Very annoying behavior.
Excellent performance in every task. Gaming is butter smooth no issues.
100x zoom is incredible. Photos are sharp and detailed in daylight conditions.
Battery drains too fast with 5G on. Had to charge twice daily frustrating.
Best Android phone of 2024. Compact size and powerful performance package.
Build quality is top notch, fits perfectly in hand. Premium feel overall.
Heating issue during video calls is concerning. Samsung needs to fix this.
Galaxy AI features are extremely useful. Live Translate during calls is brilliant.
Smooth performance and vibrant AMOLED display. One UI feels polished and refined.
Seven years of updates guarantee makes this a very safe long term investment.
Heats up noticeably during prolonged gaming sessions. Not ideal for heavy gamers.
Space Zoom 50x is phenomenal. Clear shots from very far distance impressively.
Ads in Samsung apps are irritating. Should not happen on a premium device.
Perfect compact flagship with no compromise on performance whatsoever.
All-day battery easily with moderate use. 25W charging is a bit slow though.
Armour Aluminium frame is solid. Glass back feels premium but slippery.
Good phone but felt OnePlus 12 offers more value at a lower price point.
Croma gave free Samsung care plus worth 3000 rupees with this purchase amazing.
2600 nits peak brightness makes outdoor visibility absolutely excellent clearly.
Got 12000 exchange value for old S21. Croma exchange program is very good.
Circle to Search and Chat Assist are genuinely useful AI features on phone.
Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 for Galaxy edition benchmarks significantly higher than standard.
Croma delivery was delayed by two days. No prior notification was given at all.
Nightography mode produces stunning low light shots. Best in Android segment.
One UI 6.1 is very smooth and feature rich. Samsung software has improved.
Croma price is higher than Amazon. Came here for EMI and exchange option only.
Staff helped transfer data from old phone. Service made the purchase worthwhile.
Reliance Digital had good festive offers on top of bank card discounts available.
Generative Edit feature in gallery is incredible. Removes objects seamlessly perfectly.
Finally a compact phone with no compromises. Every feature is premium level.
Throttles heavily in sustained gaming. Temperature becomes uncomfortably high.
Telephoto lens is a massive improvement over Galaxy S23. Much more detailed shots.
Too many pre-installed apps, many cannot be uninstalled. Clutters the phone.
Overall a polished premium package. Samsung truly delivers consistent quality.
Zero cost EMI for 12 months made it easy. Reliance Digital has great finance.
Promised in 2 days but took 4. Customer support response was slow too.
Using for 3 months, still as smooth as day one. Samsung reliability proven.
Vijay Sales offered extra discount with HDFC card. Total saving was around 8000.
Lowest price I found after checking all stores. Very happy with this deal.
Galaxy AI makes daily tasks smarter. Note Assist and Transcript Assist are great.
QHD plus AMOLED is the best display I have ever seen on any smartphone.
Battery life is average. Competitor phones last longer at similar pricing.
25W wired and 15W wireless charging both work well for daily needs.
Delivered securely, box intact. Vijay Sales packaging is reliable and careful.
Encountered random reboots twice in first week. Seems to be software related issue.
Vijay Sales always provides genuine Samsung products with full 1 year warranty.
Upgraded from S22 and difference is noticeable. Galaxy AI features justify upgrade.
100W charging charges from 0 to 100 in just 26 minutes. Incredible technology.
Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 performance is unbelievable. Handles anything smoothly.
Best value flagship in India right now. Hasselblad camera is genuinely excellent.
OxygenOS 14 has too many bloatware apps. Previous versions were much cleaner.
Zero thermal throttling during BGMI sessions. Consistent performance throughout.
2K LTPO display is stunning, 120Hz makes everything silky smooth great.
Battery lasts comfortably through full day heavy usage with 5G enabled.
Night mode is exceptional, rivals phones twice the price. Very happy.
Random freezes after latest update, camera app crashes occasionally. Very frustrating.
Build quality feels premium, emerald color looks stunning in sunlight.

competitors.delivery_text: Get it in 2 Days – Prime Delivery

reviews.text: OnePlus is back with true flagship killer pricing. Nothing comes close in value.
Hasselblad Natural Colour Calibration makes every photo look wonderfully true.
100W SUPERVOOC fills from dead to full in under 30 minutes consistently.
Major bug after March update, apps crash randomly. OnePlus support is slow.
2K 120Hz LTPO display is absolutely gorgeous. One of the best screens ever.
OxygenOS has too many pre-installed apps now. Earlier builds were much cleaner.
OnePlus 12 sustained gaming performance is top class. No throttling noticed.
Night shots with Hasselblad tuning are impressive. Rivals Google Pixel night mode.
Ceramic back with Gorilla Glass Victus 2 feels incredibly premium and solid.
Better value than Samsung S24 with similar performance. Wise choice overall.
Got extra 2000 off with Axis bank card at Croma. Good additional savings possible.
Flowy Emerald colour is absolutely stunning. Gets many compliments from everyone.
100W charger included in box is amazing. No separate purchase needed at all.
Genshin Impact runs on highest settings without any lag or heating issue.
Croma delivery took 5 days instead of 4. Tracking updates were also infrequent.
50W wireless charging is very fast for a wireless solution. Convenient feature.
OxygenOS is fine but not as clean as earlier versions. Getting more bloated.
Periscope telephoto lens at this price is unmatched. Zoom quality is excellent.
Croma gave complimentary screen protection and setup assistance at store pickup.
Smooth daily driver, handles multitasking effortlessly with 16GB RAM variant.
Reliance Digital had instant discount offer on OnePlus. Good overall savings.
This phone punches well above its price category in every single benchmark.
5400mAh battery is huge. With 100W charging you never fear running out of charge.
My fourth OnePlus phone and the brand keeps consistently improving every time.
Slight warmth under heavy load but vapour cooling system handles it effectively.
OxygenOS is no longer what it used to be. Too much OPPO influence ruining it.
Pro mode with Hasselblad gives manual controls that rival proper camera apps.
Reliance staff helped compare it with Samsung S24. Chose OnePlus for value.
Delivery came on 5th day. Reliance Digital logistics needs improvement urgently.
Best purchase of 2025. Performance, camera and charging trifecta is unbeatable.
Vijay Sales gave the lowest price among all stores after SBI card discount applied.
Emerald colour with marble-like finish is unlike anything else in the market.
100W charger in the box alone saves 2000 rupees. Very consumer friendly brand.
Played BGMI for 3 hours straight. Phone stayed cool and performance was stable.
2K curved display with LTPO adaptive refresh is truly a visual treat experience.
Camera app crashes after recent update. OnePlus needs to fix this issue fast.
Vijay Sales is reliable. Got genuine sealed product with all accessories included.
3x periscope telephoto gives remarkable zoom quality. Rivals much pricier phones.
OxygenOS is decent but lacks the rawness of earlier versions. Acceptable though.
Upgraded from OnePlus 9 Pro. The leap in performance and camera is massive.
Leica lenses produce professional quality photographs. Worth every single rupee.
Variable aperture lens is genius. Bokeh quality rivals DSLR cameras impressively.
Best camera phone in India hands down. Only issue is MIUI bloatware unfortunately.
Phone becomes extremely hot during 4K recording. Burns hand literally. Bad.
Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 paired with massive cooling system. Peak performance always.
MIUI 15 has too many ads in stock apps. Needs clean Android badly.
8K video recording is cinema quality. Color science from Leica is outstanding.
5000mAh battery drains in one day with heavy camera use. Expected better.
Ceramic back and titanium frame feels ultra premium. No flex at all.
Delivery took longer than expected but product quality is undeniably excellent.
Leica quad camera setup is unmatched anywhere at any price. Breathtaking photography.
Log video recording in HyperOS is fantastic for post-processing coloured grading.
4K 60fps video causes severe overheating within 10 minutes. Serious concern.
HyperOS still has ads everywhere. Xiaomi must stop this on premium devices.
16GB RAM means zero app reloads ever. Background app management is flawless.
5x optical zoom and periscope lens give spectacular detailed long-range shots.
90W HyperCharge fills up so quickly. Takes just 37 minutes for full charge.
At 229 grams this phone is quite heavy for one-handed use daily.
Nano-tech ceramic back is class-leading. Feels like no other phone in hand.
Excellent camera but software let-down makes it hard to fully recommend this.
Croma had photography kit bundle offer with this. Extra lenses were very valuable.
Nothing else on the market matches Xiaomi 14 Ultra in pure camera department.
Leica Authentic and Leica Vibrant modes produce cinematically beautiful photos.
Sustained camera use leads to thermal shutdown. Xiaomi must improve cooling system.
HyperOS is cleaner than MIUI but still has bloatware and unwanted advertisements.
Delivery took 7 days instead of 5. Croma logistics is slow for premium products.
Variable f1.42 to f4.0 aperture changes photography possibilities completely.
6.73 inch WQHD plus LTPO AMOLED is stunning. Peak 3000 nits is blinding outdoors.
No-cost EMI made this ultra-premium phone accessible. Croma finance is great.
If camera is your primary need this is the only phone you should consider buying.
Reliance Digital had launch offer with free Xiaomi buds. Good combo deal value.
Hands down the best camera smartphone ever made. Leica collaboration is brilliant.
HyperOS freezes occasionally. Paid this much and getting such bugs is unacceptable.
512GB UFS 4.0 storage means lightning-fast transfers and infinite media storage.
Warm during gaming and camera use. Not a deal-breaker but noticeable enough.
90W wired and 80W wireless charging together are the fastest in industry worldwide.
This phone is for photography enthusiasts specifically. Not a mainstream device.
Waited 7 days instead of 5. Reliance Digital needs better courier partnerships.
Leica watercolour and Leica master filter modes are creative and very impressive.
Expensive but justifiable if camera quality is your primary purchase criterion.
Best price on Xiaomi 14 Ultra found after comparing 6 different online stores.
Bought purely for photography. Every single shot looks like a professional photo.
Vijay Sales packed the device very safely. Arrived in perfect condition thankfully.
229 grams feels very heavy for prolonged one-handed use. Gets tiring quickly.
Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 paired with 16GB RAM is absolutely overkill in best way.
8K video with Leica natural colour science is what every filmmaker dreams of.
HyperOS improvement over MIUI is minimal. Ads in apps still present and annoying.
Ceramic glass back is uniquely premium. Scratches less and feels luxurious.
Heavy camera use drains battery fast. Carry charger if shooting for full day.
Bought this solely for the Leica periscope lens. Absolutely worth every rupee.
Clean stock Android with 7 years of guaranteed updates. Perfect long term phone.
AI features like Best Take and Magic Eraser are genuinely useful daily tools.
Astrophotography mode captures stars clearly. Night Sight is best in class.
Serious overheating problem even on normal usage. Google needs fix immediately.
Green tint visible at low brightness. Known issue Google acknowledged but not fixed.
Call screening feature saves from spam daily. Tensor G3 chip is very capable.
Great deal at this discounted price. Normally overpriced but Flipkart sale helps.
Only 2 service centers in my city. Parts availability is poor ongoing concern.
Adaptive battery feature learns usage well. Usually lasts full day comfortably.
Price drop made this irresistible. Best value flagship available right now.
Gemini AI integration in Pixel 8 Pro is far ahead of any competitor phone today.
Guaranteed Android updates for 7 years means this phone will last very long.
Tensor G3 chip handles AI tasks brilliantly but lags behind in gaming benchmarks.
Device heats up even during WhatsApp video calls. Thermal management is poor.
Night Sight 2.0 and astrophotography are unmatched by any Android phone today.
Green tint at low brightness is a hardware flaw. Affects nighttime viewing badly.
LTPO OLED with 1-120Hz adaptive refresh is super smooth and battery efficient.
Service centers are very limited across India. Google must expand reach urgently.
Amazon Prime delivery of sealed unit next day. Unboxing experience was premium.
Switched from iPhone and the camera AI features genuinely surprised me pleasantly.
Croma staff helped compare with iPhone 15. Pixel camera AI won hands down.
Pixel experience is pure and clean. No bloat, no ads, no unnecessary pre-installs.
Best Take and Photo Unblur features save many photos from being deleted forever.
Chronic overheating issue is well documented. Google has not fixed it yet sadly.
Body temperature sensor is a unique practical feature not found elsewhere.
Green tint under low brightness is distracting while reading in dark environment.
Got zero cost 18 month EMI from Croma with Bajaj Finance. Very good option.
Google Assistant and Gemini AI integration make this smarter than any rival.
Croma price is higher than Flipkart. Came only for in-store demo and EMI options.
7 years of updates means Pixel 8 Pro will be relevant until 2031. Smart buy.
Reliance Digital had launch event demo. Convinced me to buy Pixel over Samsung.
Magic Eraser and Magic Audio Eraser together make post-processing effortless.
Tensor G3 runs warm during sustained usage. Better than G2 but still needs work.
Nearest Google service center is 80 km away. This is a serious concern for me.
2000 nits peak brightness OLED panel makes outdoor visibility exceptional always.
Pro controls, Audio Magic Eraser and VoiceMatch make this a truly smart device.
Adaptive Battery AI extends daily battery life noticeably after learning habits.
The well-known green tint issue at low brightness affects night time reading badly.
Delivery came day 4 despite 3-day promise. Product fine but logistics unreliable.
Monthly security patches arrive day one on Pixel. Unbeatable software experience.
Vijay Sales gave highest discount on Pixel 8 Pro. Best price guarantee matched.
Astrophotography mode actually works in cities with moderate light pollution too.
Delivered in exactly 2 days as promised. Very reliable on-time delivery service.
Phone throttles heavily after 15 minutes of gaming. Tensor G3 thermal issue.
Camera Pixel with AI is a category unto itself. No one else does this well.
Green screen tint is a hardware defect present across all units. Unresolved issue.
Clean Android 14 with zero bloatware is the most refreshing experience in phones.
Limited Pixel service centers across India make post-purchase support difficult.
5x optical zoom and Super Res Zoom together cover all telephoto needs perfectly.
Gemini integration and Pixel exclusive AI features justify buying this over rivals.
